channel.title: Validations on Ocean Model Validation
channel.description: Recent content in Validations on Ocean Model Validation

item.title: AMM7 — Analysis Overview
item.description:
AMM7 Analysis Overview

This page summarises the analyses available for the AMM7 area, organised by type. Use the table of contents to jump to a specific section.

Tidal Analysis

No tidal analysis has been performed for this area yet.

Horizontal Surface Validation

  • TPXO9

Horizontal Bottom Layer Validation

No horizontal bottom-layer validation has been performed for this area yet.

Gridded 3D Validation

No gridded 3D profile validation has been performed for this area yet.

item.description:

Horizontal Bottom Layer Validation

item.title: ENA4 — Analysis Overview
item.description:
ENA4 Analysis Overview

This page summarises the analyses available for the ENA4 area, organised by type. Use the table of contents to jump to a specific section.

Tidal Analysis

  • TPXO9
    Constituent Amp err (m) Phase err (°)
    M2 0.217 21.5
    S2 0.060 26.0
    K1 0.037 37.5
    O1 0.014 15.6

Horizontal Surface Validation

  • ObsKd — 2016–2023

    Variable Dataset RMSE Bias Corr
    TEMP OSTIA 1.381 +0.176 0.76
    • 2016 · 2016-2023 · 2017 · 2018 · 2019 · 2020 · 2021 · 2022 · 2023

Horizontal Bottom Layer Validation

item.title: NS — Analysis Overview
item.description:
NS Analysis Overview

This page summarises the analyses available for the NS area, organised by type. Use the table of contents to jump to a specific section.

Tidal Analysis

No tidal analysis has been performed for this area yet.

Horizontal Surface Validation

Ranking

  • SSR_STR — 2016–2023

    Variable Dataset RMSE Bias Corr
    SALT CCI-SSS 1.943 +0.476 0.84
    TEMP CCI-SST 1.095 +0.215 0.86
    TEMP OSTIA 1.107 +0.117 0.83
    • 2016 · 2017 · 2018 · 2019 · 2020 · 2021 · 2022 · 2023

  • SSRD_STRD — 2016–2023

item.title: AMM7 - TPXO9 - Tidal Analysis
item.description:
Tidal Analysis - AMM7 - TPXO9

Harmonic analysis of sea surface elevation compared with satellite products and tide gauge observations.

Analysis Summary

Analyzed Constituents: K1, K2, M2, N2, O1, P1, Q1, S2
Analysis Date: 2026-04-11
Satellite Product: FES2014/TPXO9

Plots

Tide Gauge Station Map

GESLA tide gauge station locations

Year 2019

K₁ (lunar-solar diurnal) — amplitude/phase comparison with GESLA tide gauges

item.title: ENA4 - Experiment Adaptive_2
item.description:
ENA4 - Experiment Adaptive_2

Horizontal Validation results comparing model output against observations.

Experiment Information

Area: ENA4 Experiment: Adaptive_2 Validation Type: Horizontal Validation Variables: Period: 2016–2023

Overview

Annual Statistics Trends

Salinity (surface) — annual statistics timeseries (RMSE, bias, correlation)

Temperature (surface) — annual statistics timeseries (RMSE, bias, correlation)

Salinity (bottom) — annual statistics timeseries (RMSE, bias, correlation)

item.title: ENA4 - Experiment ObsKd
item.description:
ENA4 - Experiment ObsKd

Horizontal Validation results comparing model output against observations.

Experiment Information

Area: ENA4 Experiment: ObsKd Validation Type: Horizontal Validation Variables: SALT_BOTTOM, TEMP_BOTTOM, TEMP_SURFACE Period: 2016–2023

Overview

Metric SALT_BOTTOM / NWS-salinity TEMP_BOTTOM / NWS-bottomT TEMP_SURFACE / OSTIA
RMSE 0.5593 1.2683 1.4328
Bias 0.1819 0.5761 0.2337
Corr 0.8458 0.9720 0.7563
N points 14,040 14,040 489,830

Annual Statistics Trends

Temperature (surface) — annual statistics timeseries (RMSE, bias, correlation)

item.title: ENA8 - Experiment Baseline
item.description:
ENA8 - Experiment Baseline

Horizontal Validation results comparing model output against observations.

Experiment Information

Area: ENA8 Experiment: Baseline Validation Type: Horizontal Validation Variables: SALT_BOTTOM, PSAL_CTD, TEMP_CTD, SALT_SURFACE Period: 2016–2023

Overview

Metric SALT_BOTTOM / NWS-salinity PSAL_CTD / ICES cruise CTD profiles TEMP_CTD / ICES cruise CTD profiles SALT_SURFACE / CCI-SSS
RMSE 0.7300 0.4301 1.7252 0.9596
Bias -0.0132 -0.0251 -1.0733 0.1781
Corr 0.8645 0.7354 0.9565 0.6260
N points 55,464 249,892 269,464 8,943,595

Annual Statistics Trends

item.title: NS - Experiment Adaptive_1
item.description:
NS - Experiment Adaptive_1

Horizontal Validation results comparing model output against observations.

Experiment Information

Area: NS Experiment: Adaptive_1 Validation Type: Horizontal Validation Variables: SALT_BOTTOM, TEMP_BOTTOM, PSAL_CTD, TEMP_CTD, SALT_SURFACE, TEMP_SURFACE Period: 2016–2023

Overview

Metric SALT_BOTTOM / NWS-salinity TEMP_BOTTOM / NWS-bottomT PSAL_CTD / ICES cruise CTD profiles TEMP_CTD / ICES cruise CTD profiles SALT_SURFACE / CCI-SSS TEMP_SURFACE / OSTIA TEMP_SURFACE / CCI-SST
RMSE 0.7038 1.3715 1.9973 1.3349 1.9663 1.0238 1.0278
Bias -0.3967 -0.5514 -0.6306 -0.7386 0.2989 0.0755 0.1374
Corr 0.8617 0.9200 0.4578 0.9196 0.8258 0.8685 0.8820
N points 58,068 58,068 524 469 2,064,075 1,998,375 2,150,185

Annual Statistics Trends

Salinity (surface) — annual statistics timeseries (RMSE, bias, correlation)
